content: Apple (AAPL) is a Technology company with ~$3000B market cap. Key segments: iPhone, Services, Mac, iPad, Wearables. As a mega-cap, it's a core holding in most index funds (SPY, QQQ) and influences sector-wide moves.

When analyzing AAPL, focus on: revenue growth rate (YoY), operating margin trends, free cash flow yield (FCF/market cap), and forward P/E relative to 5-year average. For Technology stocks, compare against sector ETF (XLT) performance.
